_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: GRDC24 packaged in AAV-DJ was applied to NF1−/− cells 3 days prior or 2 days after the start of SC differentiation and in both cases NF1−/− cells were able to acquire a SC morphology and stained positive for the SC marker S100B
details: GRDC24 rescued SC differentiation capacity and enabled cells to acquire SC morphology and stain positive for S100B marker
